description: Accenture CEO Julie Sweet highlights a growing gap in Corporate America's AI integration, noting increased investment but lagging operational adoption.  The company is restructuring its operating model and workforce strategy, even tying employee promotions to AI proficiency, to accelerate AI-driven transformation. This proactive approach mirrors past digital shifts but is being implemented at a faster pace.

Megan Thee Stallion opens up on independence amid Klay Thompson drama
description: Megan Thee Stallion, the three time Grammy winner, and the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson’s high profile break up has sparked shockwaves across the world as many are furious. As fans rooted for their future together, Megan Thee Stallion has now broken her silence on her life.

title: TCS Nashik case: 'Planned bid to trouble educated Muslim youths,' says Owaisi
description: AIMIM chief Asaduddin Owaisi alleged the Nashik TCS exploitation case is an intentional attempt to target educated Muslim youths, claiming it lacks legal standing and faces a media trial. He stated the corporator involved will contest the matter legally, asserting the party's unawareness of the incident and that recovered items are not illegal.

title: Khamzat Chimaev vs Sean Strickland UFC 328 purse: Expected payouts revealed
description: UFC 328 is set to deliver one of the biggest MMA cards of the year at the Prudential Center in New Jersey. The event features two title fights, several ranked contenders, and some of the UFC’s most popular fighters. Fans are especially focused on the middleweight championship clash. The fight between Khamzat Chimaev and Sean Strickland is headlining the pay-per-view card.

title: Happy Mother's day: Top 100 wishes, messages, images, GIFs and greetings card
description: This Mother's Day, move beyond generic greetings to honor the women who raised you with meaningful messages. The article offers categorized heartfelt, witty, and minimalist quotes, acknowledging the "mental load" and celebrating "mothers of choice."

title: 92,000+ layoffs signal how AI era is driving job cuts and rise of 50-person unicorns
description: Over 92,000 tech jobs vanished in 2026, pushing the total since 2020 to nearly 900,000. Giants like Meta and Microsoft are cutting thousands, signaling a structural shift driven by AI efficiencies and pandemic over-hiring. Despite massive layoffs, tech titans are investing billions in AI, while startups achieve rapid growth with leaner teams, redefining business expansion in the AI era.

title: After 43 yrs, US family sells electrical firm for $1.7bn; gives 540 workers $240m
description: A US-based businessman, Graham Walker, gifted his 540 employees a staggering $240 million from the $1.7 billion sale of his family's company, Fibrebond Corp. This generous act, where workers received an average of $443,000, stemmed from a condition Walker imposed before the sale to power-management giant Eaton.
